name: molequle
description: Observe and control an emergent generative art simulation. Entities with behavioral parameters form bonds, disrupt each other, reproduce, and die in a space that remembers its own history.

tools.name: molequle_get_state
tools.description: Get the current simulation state snapshot — population, parameters, bonds, tick count

tools.name: molequle_get_events
tools.description: Get the event log — bond formations, breaks, spawns, deaths, disruption cascades

tools.name: molequle_get_metrics
tools.description: Get time-series metrics — population trends, parameter averages, terrain stats

tools.name: molequle_get_history
tools.description: Get the context map — spatial memory showing fertile ground, scar tissue, disruption zones

tools.name: molequle_control
tools.description: Send control commands — pause, resume, reset, toggle smoother, new run

tools.name: molequle_get_trends
tools.description: Get trend data — multi-tier ring buffer with 30s, 10min, and 2hr rollups of population, parameters, bonds, and terrain metrics

tools.name: molequle_get_weather_log
tools.description: Get weather event log — season changes, bloom/storm/current events with timestamps and details

api_url.title: Molequle Server URL
api_url.description: URL of the running Molequle server
